reviews.name: 복실
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡
안녕하세요! 강동구 명예순찰개 복덩이 복실이에요. 매일 산책 후 돌아와서 발 닦기 의식 때마다 너무 피곤하고 지루하고.. 그래서 가끔 몰래 도망가려다 언니한테 붙잡히고 뭐 그런 식의 나날들이었는데요🤨 언니가 가져온 이 실리콘 매트!! 아주아주 요물입니다...😋 우선 발 닦을 때 뭐 하나 더 얻어먹을 수 있다는 점이 참 좋고 벽에 찹 잘 붙어있으니까 안심하고 냠냠쩝쩝할 수 있어요! 개로서 아쉬운 점은, 바닥에 붙어있을 때 그냥 막 입으로 물어다 뒤집고 패대기치고 하면 좀 쉽게 먹을 수 있었는데...장판에 너무 쫙 달라붙는 바람에 열심히 혀와 앞니만 써야 한다는 점?...하지만 언니는 그게 더 좋대요.🥺 급하게 먹는 친구들이나 나처럼 매일 산책 후 발 닦을 때 싫어 죽겠는 친구들은 완전 강추! 말랑하고 얇아서 설거지도 짱 쉽다니까 사람친구들에게도 강추✨

아! 복실이의 꿀팁🍯 매끈한 타일인데도 잘 붙지 않는다면 벽면에 물을 좀 뿌리고 촵 붙여보세요. 그럼 모두들 맛있는 하루!🍖
reviews.content_en:
🧡Honest Dog Employee Review🧡
Hello! I'm Bokdungi Boksili, the honorary patrol dog of Gangdong-gu. Every time I come back from my walk and have to do the foot-wiping ritual, it's so tiring and boring... so I'd sometimes try to sneak away but get caught by my sister, that kind of days, you know?🤨 But this silicone mat my sister brought!! It's absolutely amazing...😋 First of all, it's so nice that I can get an extra snack while wiping my paws, and since it sticks so well to the wall, I can nibble away without worry! The downside as a dog is, when it was on the floor I could just flip it and throw it around with my mouth to eat it easily, but because it sticks SO well to the flooring, I have to work hard with just my tongue and front teeth?...but my sister says that's actually better.🥺 For friends who eat in a rush or friends like me who absolutely hate the post-walk foot-wiping ritual, I highly recommend! It's soft and thin so people say it's super easy to wash too, so I recommend it to human friends too✨

Oh! Boksili's pro tip🍯 Even if it doesn't stick well to smooth tiles, try spraying some water on the wall and stick it on! Then everyone have a tasty day!🍖

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
실리콘 릭매트 꼭 필요했던 아이템이에요 !!!! 전 하늘색으로 구매했어요♥️
최근에 댕댕이용 땅콩버터를 구매했는데 슬로우 패드에 발라주면 챱챱 잘 먹을 것 같더라구요. 바잇미 실리콘 릭매트는 노즈워크도 되구 4가지 패턴이 있어서 다양하게 급여가 가능하네요 >< 사료를 끼워서 주기도 해보고 간식 끼워서 주기도 해봤는데 잘 먹어요. 먹다보면 발로 매트 밟고 막 그러는데 그 모습이 너무 또 귀여워여ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ !!!!! 밑에 빨판(?)이 있어서 바닥에 착붙 ! 고정도 잘 됩니당 !

땅콩버터의 경우 사이사이에 낀 거 설거지 하기 좀 빡시긴 한데 그건 감안할 부분이구요.
reviews.content_en:
This silicone lick mat was exactly the item I needed!!!! I bought it in sky blue♥️
Recently I got some peanut butter for my pup, and I thought it would work great on a slow feeder pad! The BITE ME silicone lick mat is also good for nose work and comes in 4 different patterns so you can provide meals in various ways >< I've tried putting kibble in it and treats in it, and my pup eats really well. While eating, my pup steps on the mat with their paws and it's just SO cute ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ !!!!! There's a suction cup (?) on the bottom so it sticks to the floor! The fixation works really well too!

With peanut butter, cleaning the stuck bits in between is a bit of a hassle, but that's something to keep in mind.

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
친구랑 같이 쓰려고 주문했어요~ 비슷한 제품들 색상이 맘에 안들거나 환공포와서 안샀는데.. 넘 이뻐요-♡
오자마자 세척하고 바로 해주었는데 초 집중ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I ordered it to use with a friend~ I didn't buy similar products because I didn't like the colors or was worried about off-gassing, but this one is so pretty-♡
I washed it right away and used it immediately, and my pup was SO focused ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 습식사료 가끔주면 30초컷하는 돼지애기인데 여기에다 발라주니 5분넘게 핥고있네요 ㅎㅎ 천천히 혀자극 느끼면서 먹는거 같아 기분 좋아요 색깔도 너무 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: I have a piggy pup who finishes wet food in 30 seconds, but when I put it on this mat, he licks it for over 5 minutes ㅎㅎ It seems like he's enjoying the slow tongue stimulation, so that makes me happy. The color is so pretty too

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
급하게 먹어 몇번을 캑켁 거렸는지 ㅠ 
보자마자 바로 구매했어요~ 
그릇이 반 ,매트에 반 주고 있는데 속도가 좀 늦어지긴 했어요 ㅎ 바닥에 흡착할수 있어 움직이지 않고 좋아뇨
reviews.content_en: I don't know how many times he choked from eating in a rush ㅠ I bought it as soon as I saw it~ I'm giving half in a bowl and half on the mat, and it did slow down the eating speed a bit ㅎ Since it can suction to the floor, it doesn't move and that's great

reviews.content: 쓸데없이 비싼거 같아서 못샀는데 바잇미에서 만들었고 가격도 저려미라 바로 샀어용 ! 애들 넘 좋아하고 세척도 편해서 만족해용 💙
reviews.content_en: I didn't buy it because it seemed unnecessarily expensive, but since BITE ME made it and the price was lower, I bought it right away! My pups love it so much and it's easy to clean so I'm satisfied 💙

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 요즘 노즈워크도 다 마스터 해서 너무 심심해하는 와중에 바잇미 실리콘매트 발견해서 넘 좋아요! 이런 신박한 걸 어케 생각하지…🥹 치즈 껴서 먹이니까 넘 잘 먹습니다 🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: My pup has mastered all the nose work toys lately and was getting so bored, but then I found the BITE ME silicone mat and I love it! How did they even come up with something so innovative…🥹 He eats so well when I stuff cheese in it 🫶🏻

reviews.name: k****
reviews.content: 이거 엄청 좋아요~~ 애기가 너무 좋아하고 츄르부터 시작해서 우유나 사료까지 정말 잘 먹어요^^
reviews.content_en: This is amazing~~ My pup loves it so much and eats really well with everything from churu to milk to kibble^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 야옹이도 츄르랑 트릿 뿌려주니까 잘 먹네요
reviews.content_en: My kitty also eats well when I sprinkle churu and treats on it

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
여러 모양이라 다양해서 좋았고, 다른 매트에 비해서 저렴해 더 좋았어요♥
그리고 바닥에 잘 붙어서 먹을때 움직이지 않고 고정되어 굉장히 만족해요!
저희 집 강아지는 대형견이라 바닥에서 뜯어 올리긴 하지만,,,
남자친구 강아지는 닥스인데 20분 넘게 핥아 먹어서 힘들어 하더라구요ㅎㅎ
분리불안 강아지한테 짱!
reviews.content_en:
It was nice that it comes in multiple shapes so it's versatile, and compared to other mats it's more affordable so that's even better♥
And since it sticks well to the floor, it doesn't move while eating and stays fixed, so I'm really satisfied!
My large dog can peel it off the floor though,,,
But my boyfriend's dachshund licks it for over 20 minutes and seems like it's tough ㅎㅎ
Perfect for dogs with separation anxiety!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지 피넛버터 발라줄려고 구매했어요.색도 이쁘고 타일이나 장판에 붙어서 미끄러지지 않아 좋아요~습식사료나 츄르를 발라주어도 될 것 같은데 피넛버터같이 꾸덕한 건 설거지가 어렵긴 하네요~그래도 울 아가가 너무 잘 써서 만족해요
reviews.content_en: I bought this to spread peanut butter for my dog. The color is pretty and it doesn't slip on tiles or laminate floors, which is great~ I think it would work well with wet food or treats too, but cleaning after thicker stuff like peanut butter is a bit tough~ Still, my pup uses it so well that I'm really happy with it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
동결건조사료를 먹고있어서 사료로 노즈워크를 할수가 없더라구요. 
그때 알게된게 실리콘 매트인데 다른 실리콘 매트 보다가 믿고쓰는 바잇미꺼로 처음 구매 해봤습니다. 
디자인도 심플하고 색상도 너무 예뻐요. 
소형견에게 딱 맞는 크기에 여러가지 패턴이 있어서 아이도 엄청 재미있어하고 집중해서 오래먹어요. 
세척도 간편하고 어디에나 붙여놓을수 있게 뒷부분에 접착하는것도 있어 여기저기 흘리지도 않아 좋구요.
습식이나 동결건조 사료 먹이신다면 꼭 한번 써보시는거 추천드립니다.
노즈워크 엄청 좋아하는 아이인데 밥까지 가끔 이렇게 주면 기로성 떨어져 잘 안먹는 사료도 엄청 오래 붙잡고 먹어요. 
가격도 다른 실리콘 매트에 비해서 정말 착하고 다른 패턴, 색상이 더 나온다면 재구매 의사 있습니다.
여러개 구비해놓고 다양하게 급여해주고 싶어요 :)
reviews.content_en: My dog eats freeze-dried food, so I couldn't do nose work with regular kibble. That's when I discovered silicone mats, and I decided to try BITE ME since it's a trusted brand. The design is simple and the colors are so pretty. The size is perfect for small dogs and there are several patterns, so my pup finds it super fun and spends a long time eating it with focus. It's easy to clean and the adhesive backing means it sticks anywhere without making a mess. If you feed your dog wet or freeze-dried food, I definitely recommend trying this. My pup loves nose work, and when I serve meals this way sometimes, even food he usually doesn't eat well, he'll hold onto and eat for a really long time. The price is very reasonable compared to other silicone mats, and I'd definitely rebuy if more patterns and colors come out. I want to stock up on several and feed him a variety! :)

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
핥는걸 참 좋아하는 친구에오! 요즘 밥을 급하게 먹고 체하기도 하고, 흥분도 낮추는데도 도움이 된데서 구매해봤ㄹ습니다 
함께 구매한 피넛버터랑 아주 잘 맞구요! 습식 올려주기도 좋아요! 다양한 매트 질감이라 좋고, 몰랑몰랑해서 들고 다니며 핥고, 세척이 좀 까다롭지만 친구가 너무 좋아해서 왜 이제 샀나 싶어요! 
특히 산책 ㅁ오래 못하는 미세먼지 심한날 집에수 놀아주는 걸러 아주 젛습니다!
reviews.content_en: For a friend who loves to lick! These days he eats his meals too quickly and gets indigestion, and I heard it helps lower excitement, so I decided to try it. It pairs really well with the peanut butter I bought together! It's great for topping with wet food too! I love the different mat textures, and since it's soft and squishy, I can carry it around and lick it. Cleaning is a bit tricky, but my friend loves it so much that I wonder why I didn't buy it sooner! Especially on days with bad air quality when we can't take long walks, it's perfect for playing indoors!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
📣목욕어려움/밥빨리먹음/분리불안 등 ➡️ 이겁니다 여러분!!
아주 요물이에요~ 아이가 물을 싫어해서 목욕할 때마다 힘들었는데... 드!디!어! 오늘 편하게 목욕을 마쳤어요!

집중의 5분+미련의 5분=10분의 시간이 주어져요😁
아이도 스트레스를 덜 받고~ 나중에 목욕도 좋아하겠죠?
릭매트러 멈머랑 오늘도 스트레스없이 잘 보내자구요💙
reviews.content_en: 📣Difficult baths/eats too fast/separation anxiety, etc. ➡️ THIS IS IT, everyone!! This is absolutely magic~ My pup hates water so bath time was always a struggle... but FINALLY! Today we finished bathing with ease! You get 5 minutes of focus + 5 minutes of hesitation = 10 minutes total 😁 My pup gets less stressed~ and maybe they'll even like baths later, right? With the lick mat, let's have a stress-free day today too 💙

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
밥을 잘 안 먹으려고 하는 아이라 구매해봤어요
바닥에 간식으로 먹이는 걸 발라놓고 그 위에 사료를 뿌렸더니 잘 먹네요 ><
하나씩 클리어 하는 ㅎㅎ

밥 하나를 먹더라도 즐겁게 먹는거 같아 만족합니다!
색상도 너무 이쁜 노랑! 딱 버터옐로우!! ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought this because my pup wasn't eating well. I spread treats on the mat and sprinkled kibble on top, and now he eats it great! >< He clears it one by one hehe. Even if he just eats one meal, it seems like he enjoys it, so I'm happy! The color is such a pretty yellow too! Exactly butter yellow!! hehe

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
오자마자 씻어서 써봤는데 너무 좋아요! 
모양이 다양해서 좋구 
밑에 빨판이 쎄서 고정도 잘되구요
reviews.content_en: I washed it as soon as it arrived and it's so good! The shapes are varied and nice, and the suction cups on the bottom are strong so it stays fixed well.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
소프트
블루 구매했어요. 중형견 기쥰 크기 적당하고 색 예쁩니다.
실리콘 냄새도 크게 안나고 씻어서 고구마 발라줬더니 껌 간식 먹듯 손으로 잡고 오래 먹네요.평소 급하게 먹는 편이라 이부분이 맘에 들고 잘 산거 같아요.
reviews.content_en: I bought the soft blue. The size is just right for medium-sized dogs and the color is lovely. The silicone doesn't have a strong smell, and after washing, I spread some sweet potato and he holds it with his paws and eats it for a long time like he's chewing gum. Since he usually eats in a rush, I really like this aspect and feel like I made a good purchase.

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
여름에 우유나 요거트같은거 얼려주고싶어서 구매했어요!
밑판에 뽁뽁이 있어서 벽이나 바닥 어디든 착착 너무 잘 붙어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
오래 핥아먹어서 강쥐 목 안아프게 키높이에 맞게 벽에 붙여주면 좋을 것 같네용!!
reviews.content_en: I bought this because I wanted to freeze milk or yogurt in it for summer! The bottom has a suction cup so it sticks to walls or floors really well hehe! Since my pup licks it for a long time, if you stick it on the wall at the right height for your dog's neck, it should be comfortable!

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content: 생각보다 엄청 커서 놀랬어요 ! 파스텔컬러 너무 예쁘네요 ㅎㅎ 모양도 다양해서 하기 좋음 ~~~~
reviews.content_en: I was surprised it was way bigger than I expected! The pastel colors are so pretty hehe! The shapes are varied so it's fun to use ~~~~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 샤워할때나 드라이룸에서 사용할 때 쓰려고 주문했어요! 패턴이 다양해서 먹는 재미가 있을거 같아요! 벌집패턴이 아이가 가장 늦게 먹더러구요 ㅎㅎ 츄르 하나로 목욕부터 드라이룸까지 끝냈습니더
reviews.content_en: I ordered this to use during baths and in the drying room! Since there are various patterns, it should be fun to eat! The honeycomb pattern is the one my pup eats the slowest hehe. I finished everything from bath to drying room with just one tube of treats!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 요놈 참 물건입니다 식탐 많아서 간식주면 웬만한 뼈간식 아닌 이상 1분컷인데 릭매트 쓰니까 10분정도 가지고 놀아요 ㅎㅎ 종종 애용할 예정입니다 완전 강추!!!
reviews.content_en: This thing is seriously amazing! 🐾 My pup's a total foodie and usually demolishes any treat in like 1 minute flat, but with this lick mat, they're playing with it for like 10 minutes haha 😄 Definitely gonna be using this regularly. Highly recommend!!!

reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content: 뒷면에 고정장치가 있어서 좋습니다. 관절약이랑 피부약이  액체로 되어있어서 이 제품 사용하여 먹이니깐 좋내요
reviews.content_en: Love that there's a suction cup on the back to keep it in place. Since my pet's joint and skin meds are liquid, this product works perfectly for getting them to take it - super convenient!

reviews.name: 람****
reviews.content:
앞면은 이상 없는데 뒷면에 오염물질 묻어 있어요. 지워지지도 않고 볼펜 묻은거 마냥 오염 됐어요.
그냥 귀찮고 짜증나서 교환 안 하고 사용하려고 하는데..... 
바잇미에서 만드는 제품 은근히 이렇게 오염 묻은거 확인 안 하고 판매하는데 검수 잘해주세요. 
포장하면서 제품 5초만 봐도 보이는 오염들이에요!!
우비도 2번이나 그랬고 이번 릭매트도 오염있고...하......
reviews.content_en: The front looks fine, but there's some contamination/dirt on the back. It won't come off and looks like someone scribbled on it with a pen. Honestly, I'm just too annoyed to bother with an exchange, so I'll just use it as is... But BITE ME, you really need to improve your quality control. These are products you're putting out with visible dirt that you'd spot in like 5 seconds just by looking during packing!! This happened with the raincoat twice, and now the lick mat too... ugh...

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
밥을 흡입하는 아이가 있어서 먹부림이 심해서 구입했어요
튼튼해보이네요ㅎㅎ
열탕소독도 되니 안심하고 쓸수있네요
reviews.content_en: My pup inhales their food and makes a huge mess, so I got this to slow them down! Seems super durable 😄 Plus it's safe to boil sanitize, so I can use it with confidence!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
츄르 짜서 주니 너무잘먹네요
창문이나 바닥에 딱달라붙어서 고정도잘돼용
reviews.content_en: Squeeze some CHURU on it and they go crazy for it! 🤤 It sticks perfectly to windows and floors and stays put really well.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
아주 잘 쓰고 있습니다!! 허겁지겁 먹고 목에 켁켁 걸려서 맨날 손으로 일일이 주다가 안전하게 혼자서도 먹을 수 있어요!! 
나우 퍼피 주는데 알갱이가 작은 것도 다 콕콕 박혀서 애기가 천천히 먹을 수 있습니다! 추천해요!!
습식 발라서 핥아먹게 하는 용으로도 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: I'm using this all the time!! My pup used to gulp everything down so fast and choke on it - I had to hand-feed them every time. Now they can safely eat on their own!! I use it with NOW PUPPY and even the smallest kibbles get stuck in the grooves so my baby eats slowly! Highly recommend!! It's also great for spreading wet food and letting them lick it up.

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content: 대형견들도 충분할듯 !! 생각보다 너무 좋네요 굿굿
reviews.content_en: Even works great for large breed dogs!! Way better than I expected. Love it 👍

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
너무 좋은것같아요ㅎㅎ
혼자 냅둘때 해주고 나가요
reviews.content_en: Really love it! 😄 I leave it for them when I go out.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 급하게 먹고 자꾸 토해서 슬로우 식기 알아보다가 맘에 들어서 구입해봤어요. 4개 다 다른 모양으로 되어있어서 좋았고 벽에도 붙일 수 있어서 좋아요. 그런데 여기에 먹어도 뭐가 문제인지 토하더라구요ㅠㅠ 제품 자체는 맘에 듭니다.
reviews.content_en: My pup eats too fast and throws up a lot, so I was looking into slow feeders and really liked this one. The pack comes with 4 different shapes which is cool, and it can stick to the wall too. But weirdly, my pup still throws up even when using this 😢 The product itself is great though.

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content:
이거 진짜진짜 꿀템이에요👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻
먹으면서 놀이까지 애기가 넘 좋아해요~~
밥때도 아닌데 요고 보기만해도 흥분지수 상승😆
신나서 뛰고 돌고 난리난리ㅋㅋㅋ 넘잘쓰고있어요💛
reviews.content_en: This is a TOTAL GAME CHANGER!! 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻 My baby gets both playtime AND mealtime fun out of it~~ Even when it's not feeding time, just seeing it makes their excitement level go through the roof 😆 They jump around, spin in circles, it's total chaos haha 🤣 Using it all the time and loving it 💛

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
혼자서 잘먹고놀아요  ㅎㅎ
어디나갈때 저거해주고나가니 좋네요
엄청튼튼해요
reviews.content_en: He eats well and plays on his own haha 😄 It's great because I give it to him before I go anywhere. It's super durable!

reviews.name: 육****
reviews.content:
아직 사용전이지만 아주 유용하게 사용할수있을거같아요
특히 여름에 바나나, 땅콩버터 등등 애들이 좋아하는거 발라 열려줌 너무 좋을꺼같아요
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet, but I think it'll be really useful! Especially in summer, I can spread banana, peanut butter, and other things my pups love on it—I think it's going to be amazing!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저도 써보고 너무 만족해서 친구도 선물했던 템!! 그릭요거트 피넛버 터 코코넛오일 요런거 발라서 던져주고 외출하기 짜앙
reviews.content_en: I tried it myself and was so satisfied that I even gifted it to a friend!! I spread Greek yogurt, peanut butter, coconut oil, and stuff like that on it, then throw it and head out 😄

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 릭매트에 간식을 뿌려주면 더 맛나게 먹을 수 있어요~🩷
reviews.content_en: When I sprinkle treats on the lick mat, he can enjoy eating even more~🩷

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
릭매트에 해줬더니 넘 잘먹어요
야채퓨례 발라주니 오래먹어용
reviews.content_en: He eats so well when I use the lick mat! And when I spread veggie puree on it, he eats for a long time

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content:
시골집 놀러가서 가족끼리 마당에서 식사할때 여름이 오랫동안 맛잇게 먹게끔 해주고 싶어 챙겨갔어요
평소 다른 매트도 서용해봐서 잘 사용해요
네가지버전에 커서 좋았어요
다만 아쉬운건 잘안붙는거같아요
그래서 그냥 얹ㅇ져놓고 사용했어요
reviews.content_en: We went to our countryside house and had a family meal in the yard, so I brought this to keep our pup Summer happily occupied while eating for a long time. I've tried other mats before and use them well. I liked that it comes in four versions and a larger size. The only downside is that it doesn't stick very well, so I just laid it out and used it as is.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 눈 여겨 본 제품인데 다양한 모양으로 있어서 구매했는데 만족합니다!
reviews.content_en: This was a product I had my eye on, and I bought it because it comes in various shapes—very satisfied!

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content: 벽에도 잘 붙어있고 보관하기도 용이한 것 같아요. 딱 맘에 듭니다
reviews.content_en: It sticks really well to the wall and is easy to store. It's exactly what I wanted!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 외출할 때 노즈워크해주고 나가면 쳐다보지도 않아요 ㅋㅋ 근데 안쪽 깊이 들어간건 잘 못먹긴하더라구요! 그래서 세척을 열심히 하고있습니다.
reviews.content_en: When I do some nose work on it before going out, he doesn't even look at me afterwards haha But the deeper grooves are a bit hard for him to lick clean! So I've been washing it thoroughly.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 요즘 릭매트 모으고 있어요 ! 세척 간편해서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I'm collecting lick mats these days! I love how easy they are to clean

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 잘가지고 놀아여.흡착력도 좋고
reviews.content_en: She plays with it well. The suction is really good too.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 습식사료나 과일퓨레 올려주는데, 노즈워크 하듯 엄청 집중해서 먹습니다! 지루해 하는 시간에 틈틈히 활용하고 있어요~
reviews.content_en: I put wet food or fruit puree on it, and she eats it with incredible focus like she's doing a nose work activity! I use it here and there when she seems bored~

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
집에서 셀프미용하면서 사용하려고 샀어요.
강아지가 집중해서 잘 핥아 먹네요. 만족합니다! 
잘 사용할 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: I bought it to use while grooming my dog at home. My pup concentrates well and licks it up nicely. I'm satisfied! I think we'll use it a lot.

reviews.content: 츄르를 간편하게 줄수있어서 좋아요! 혓바닥도 깨끗해질것같아요
reviews.content_en: It's great because I can easily give her treats! Her tongue should get clean too.

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content: 밥을 너무 급하게 먹는 것 같아 구매했어요! 습식으로 되어 있는 타입은 잘 맞는 것 같아용
reviews.content_en: My pup was eating her food way too fast, so I got this! The wet food type seems to work really well for her.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
첨이라 낯설어하더니 치즈발라주니 잘 먹네요
그냥줄때보다 꽤 오랜시간먹어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: She was wary at first since it was new, but once I put some cheese on it, she eats it well. She takes much longer to finish compared to when I just give it to her plain, which is great!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 짜먹는 간식 줄때 확실히 엄청 오래 먹어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: When I give her squeezable treats, she definitely takes way longer to eat them haha

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 생각보다 더 유용하게 쓰일 거 같아요
reviews.content_en: I think it's going to be more useful than I expected.

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 츄르 같은 간식 급여할 때 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: It's great for giving treats like churu!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 급하게 먹어서 잘토하는 댕댕이나 츄르도 릭매트에 주고 사료도 릭매트에 줬더니 천천히 먹어요 다만 바닥에 놓고 주니 너무 낮아서 테이블 위에 줘야할 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: Since my pup eats too quickly and tends to vomit, I tried giving her churu on the lick mat and kibble on the lick mat too, and now she eats slowly. The only thing is that when I place it on the floor it's too low, so I think I'll need to put it on a table.
